programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Brighton Resort - Episode 01
programme.desc: In our latest MICRODOSE series we aim to explore the most influential resorts and iconic locations in snowboarding history, starting with—that’s right—Brighton Resort in Salt Lake City, Utah. Welcome to Brighton Resort Episode 1 of 5. For many riders young and old, Brighton Resort will forever be the epicenter of the snowboarding world. The plentiful snowfall, terrain parks, lift ops, cat drivers, mechanics, management, cafeteria, cooks, and mountain culture are all first class. Back in the early days, very few ski resorts were willing to take a chance on the newfound “lifestyle sport” of snowboarding, but Brighton took the leap. In doing so, Brighton made all the difference. Within a few years, hundreds of ski areas around the world came to see Brighton’s approach to snowboarding as the gold standard. From the biggest vacation destinations to the smallest trash heaps covered in fake snow, everyone (whether they’ve known it or not) has borrowed from the Brighton playbook. This has made it possible for millions of would-be snowboarders to make their first turns safely in-bounds via rope-tows, chairlifts, and gondola rides. Newbies need not traipse into the backcountry with no snow sense and little skill. For this we have Brighton to thank.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Stay Tuned
programme.desc: ‘Stay Tuned’ is a snowboard film. It is also a film about the need to stay tuned mentally and physically with the natural world. Featuring Mikkel Bang, Nicolas Müller, John Jackson, Brandon Cocard, Ben Ferguson, Red Gerard, Severin Van Der Meer, Dylan Alito, Judd Henkes, and Hans Mindnich.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Yellow Flickers

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Winter Leisure
programme.desc: Legendary snowboarder Terje Haakonsen finds new joy in riding small parks and mellow terrain wherever he goes, explaining, “What I like about snowskates is that it makes small hills big again.” Join us for this fascinating look at snowskate subculture.

programme.title: Balance
programme.desc: Legendary professional snowboarder David Carrier-Porcheron reflects on Surf, Skate, and Snow culture, taking a closer look at what brings balance and happiness to people’s lives. Join us for this thoughtful and exhilarating ride with DCP.

programme.title: Perspektiv
programme.desc: David Carrier-Porcheron is a titan in the snowboarding community. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit, DCP and family were left stranded in Costa Rica. programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Ghibli, Maserati advanced into a more affordable market segment. But the competition is strong. In addition: taking the Maserati GranCabrio MC on a cruise through the Alps.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: Toyota attempted to break the lap record for electric vehicles at the Nürburgring Nordschleife with their TMg EV P001. Also: highlights from the 2012 Tokyo Motor Show. In addition: the Mitsubishi i-MiEV at the Euro NCAP test.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: The Honda CR-Z promises both driving pleasure and low emissions. We put this model to the test. Also: the prototype of Seat's Altea XL Electric Ecomotive and a look at the 2012 Essen Motor Show. And: Skoda's green Line models.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Volvo S90 offers Scandinavian elegance and a high level of security features. Jaguar entered the race with its performance sedan XF-S and Cadillac ramped up their luxury level with the CT6.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In 2015 Audi presented a facelift for their city racer A1. We put this compact to the test. Also: it's a tough competition in the compact class, and Renault and Peugeot also want a piece of the pie. We compared the Renault Twingo and the Peugeot 108.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Over the decades compact and city cars have become more and more popular, especially in urban areas. We took a look at three examples for these modern lifestyle vehicles, the 5-door Mini, the Opel Adam Rocks and the Kia Soul EV.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The Custombike show in Bad Salzuflen, Germany, is one of the leading fairs for exclusive motorcycles in Europe and a hub for news and trends in the motorbike scene. From choppers, to cruisers, street fighters to classic bikes, Harleys to Japanese motorcycles, this show always offers something exciting for every taste and age.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 19
programme.desc: Today we are in Pietarsaari, 65 degrees north latitude, in Finland. We came all the way to try one of the most beautiful boats in the world: the Swan. Then, we move to Sardinia to test a boat that has much to offer. The Karnic SL602 surprises people worldwide. Come join us!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 20
programme.desc: We are in the final episode of this season of The Boat Show! To say goodbye to this season, we get onboard the Sacs Rebel 47 Open. Then we move to Portofino, famous for its enchanting beauty, notoriety and boats. This one in particular built by Chris Craft is the Capri 21, and we are testing it on the water. Finally, we will be discovering the Saona 47 from Fountaine Pajot, a French Boatyard.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Brac – Hvar
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking you to a surfer's paradise – the island of Brač! We are on a journey to find out why Brač is called by many the island of a million olives, and we are going to explore the beautiful Pakleni islands that are close to this location. Get to know the fantastic wines of the island of Hvar and treat ourselves to some drunk lobster.

programme.title: Caesar

programme.title: Satan Claus
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the body count rising, Homicide Detective Timothy Reynolds reluctantly volunteers to assist his former partner, Detective Alan Fryer, with the investigation to a slew of grisly murders left behind by a mission orientated killer during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Chain of Souls
programme.desc: When a naive aspiring actress from Podunk, Texas disappears in Los Angeles, her protective sister comes looking for her. The clues lead her to a diabolical cult masquerading as a theater group and the fight of her life.

programme.title: Haunted Boat
programme.desc: HAUNTED BOAT is a mystical, mind-twisting psychological horror film about six teenagers going on a boat trip and getting lost in parallel dimensions where they have to face their greatest fears.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E08 - Focused on Food
programme.desc: Laramy locates some whitetail deer and focuses his efforts on hunting them.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E07 - Swimming with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Manny swims with giant gulf sturgeon on the Suwanee River.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E08 - Snapping Turtles of the Santa Fe
programme.desc: Manny explores the Santa Fe River in search of alligator, snapping turtles other wildlife.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E09 - Wild Boars, Wild Nights Part 1
programme.desc: Manny hunts wild eurasian boars with a spear, both day and night. Oh - and Manny gets bitten by his best friend!

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S02:E04 - Elephant Country
programme.desc: Ivan joins the foremost anti-poaching team in Mozambique to bring down one particular group of poachers who have been killing local elephants for their ivory.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E09 - Bighorn Range
programme.desc: Bighorn sheep are captured and translocated in the mountains of Nevada.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E10 - Preserving A Predator
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and translocate lions across Africa to replenish a once-extinct population.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E01 - Naturally Breathtaking
programme.desc: Do you know where in the world the last untouched glacier is? Where is the highest and the smallest waterfall? Which desert is the driest or the largest? Would you like to know where the most inaccessible mountains, the lowest point of the oceans or the great salt deserts are? This series offers all the answers.In the first episode, we discover breathtaking glaciers in Argentina, infinite plane in the middle of Europe, thermal miracles of Hungary, stalactite caves protected by UNESCO and the most active volcano in New Zealand – White island.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E02 - Naturally Dramatic
programme.desc: This episode describes the greatest miracle of nature that could be created by the human brain. The Loch Ness monster. It looks that is does not exist but thousands of visitors still come to see the lovely lake and to hear tales about it. Not only Nessi, but the Scottish high lands are the miracle of nature.Then we quickly visit Andalusia and remove our hat in front of the majestic mountains of Sierra Nevada.The deepest lake in the world is found in Siberia. We will talk about Baikal, the natural miracle of Russia.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E05 - The Struggle
programme.desc: Laramy remains stuck at Camp Hell Hole, nursing 7's leg, and struggling to survive in the freezing temperatures without food.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Making Out

programme.title: I Thought It Was Through
programme.desc: When despair sets in, it’s easy to assume it’ll always be this way. But what if a shift in thinking could break that cycle? Your thoughts have the power to disrupt your despair, especially when you stop focusing on what happened and start trusting the God who never left you.

programme.title: When Never Meets Now

programme.desc: They keep Julia kidnapped until Ezequiel begs for the safe return of his daughter. Camila does not give up, she wants to know who El Doliente is and thinks it could be her mother because of the photo she received of the girl in the yellow dress.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max, impatient, wants to know about his sister, Julia. Their plan is to exchange her for Ezequiel and then kill him. In a voice message Julia tells him the time and day of the exchange and Max will accompany him.

programme.title: Abigail - S01:E009 -
programme.desc: Abigail cannot travel due to the police investigation of the man who is stalking the school. Bertha demands María Clara leave her son, infuriating Carlos Alfredo. Abigail shows her affection for Estrella, who does not dare to tell her the truth.

programme.title: Abigail - S01:E010
programme.desc: The stalker leaves a doll and a rose on Abigail's bed. Carlos Alfredo apologizes to María Clara and kisses her. Bertha demands Abigail to stay away from her son. Carlos Alfredo decides to leave Bertha and she pretends to faint.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Guillermo is fixated on taking his 'woman' and Ignacio with him. Alberto warns Gertrudis that he will do the impossible to free Malena from Pablo's violence. Elvis advises Ricardo to be honest with the Marías or they will all end up with him - Virginia arrives to meet Liz and Augusto, ready to leave with the couple; to everyone's surprise, Carmen appears. Alberto proposes to Lorena.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Carmen accuses Luis and Augusto of trafficking minors. Ricardo is cornered: on the one hand he feels he cannot maintain a relationship with four women at the same time, but on the other hand there is the million dollars lost. Gertrudis celebrates that the success in the drug trafficker's trial opens the door for all of them to trust her Legal Office. Alberto is leaving the Corona house when Guillermo intercepts him on his motorcycle; threatening, he lifts the visor of his helmet and is exposed to his rival.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Clara verifies with Octavia that Pastora can prevent Israel's access to the joint accounts for the duration of the divorce proceedings.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio necesita escapar con Julia. Camila esta negada al amor, Jeli quiere que admita lo que siente por Max y ella le cuenta la razón del rechazo. En el orfanato habla con el Padre Tiziano y la Madre Isabel sobre Rosa Blanco; y cree que tiene que ver en este asunto y que es El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Esperanza, sabe sobre Rosa Blanco. Gregorio y Julia, fingen ante la familia, pero continúan encontrándose. Los Aragón siempre en guerra por la muerte de Marcos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max piensa que Camila lo rechazó por Roberto. En confesión con el Padre Tiziano, le aconseja que le cuente toda la verdad a Max, pero ella teme que Roberto la denuncie por asesina. Julia y Gregorio vuelven a encontrarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila es atropellada por un desconocido que le advierte que deje de buscar a Rosa Blanco. Esto la inquieta y acude a Max pero el le dice que no lo involucre más en este asunto. Todos temen el regreso de Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Ezequiel se enfrentan por Camila. Astrid trata de manipular a Roberto para sacarle información a cambio de dinero. Max acusa a Camila de prostituta y decide sacarla de su vida. El regreso de Rosa Blanco es traumático.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max decide enfrentar a Roberto, y cede a la seducción de Astrid, pero no por amor sino por despecho. Durante una cena familiar, Ezequiel brinda por Octavia, pero expresa su intención de casarse con otra mujer. Camila sabe que su madre regresará.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila no entiende por qué su madre regresa para vengarse y el motivo de tanto odio. Madre Isabel, Padre Tiziano y Elda, guardan un cómplice silencio. Max enfrenta a Roberto y Camila reacciona con celos y rabia.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Reto Sangriento
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes investigadores de fenómenos paranormales reciben el reto de pasar un fin de semana en una casa donde habitan seres malignos. Esto con el fin de presentar las evidencias en su programa de televisión y levantar el rating, pero lo que no saben es que el reto les costara muy caro.

programme.title: Error 113
programme.desc: Cuatro extraños se encuentran en el apartamento 113 invitados por Annie Annie, una aplicación de inteligencia artificial que ayuda a las personas con sus problemas cotidianos. Annie Annie les ha dicho que la aplicación es en realidad una persona real y que se van a encontrar cara a cara. Después de un tiempo, estos extraños comienzan a sentirse incómodos a medida que se dan cuenta de que Annie no va a poder hacerlo.

programme.title: El Campeón
programme.desc: LA HISTORIA DE UNA PROMESA DEL BOXEO, SU ENTRENADOR SOLO LO USA PARA BENEFICIO PROPIO. LA FAMA Y EL DINERO SOLO LE TRAE PROBLEMAS, ADEMAS QUE SUFAMILIA SE APROVECHA DE EL.

programme.title: Gritos del Monday
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de Ingeniería Ambiental realizan un trabajo en la Reserva Ecológica de los Saltos del Monday, conocido por su rica fauna y su rica historia. Para el trabajo, los alumnos deciden acampar en el lugar, en medio de la obscura noche son sorprendidos por un hecho que desencadenará a lo largo de sus días posteriores, en especial a una de las estudiantes.

programme.title: Choele
programme.desc: Todo ocurre en el pueblo de Choele Choel, provincia de Río Negro. Un niño y su padre intentan seguir juntos todo el verano, pero el chico ya decidió partir hacia otro lugar con su madre, cuando ésta llegue y le recoja. A la zona donde viven llega una chica, por la que comienzan a competir padre e hijo.

programme.title: Error 113

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
